description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a white exterior and a reddish-brown gable roof. The structure features multiple rectangular windows, some with visible grilles, and two black cylindrical water tanks on the roof. A prominent balcony with a white railing wraps around part of the upper floor, while the lower level includes a covered porch area. The house has a mix of solid and open spaces, with a stairway leading up to the balcony on one side. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story white house with a reddish-brown gable roof, multiple windows, balconies, and rooftop water tanks.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the balcony, porch, and main entry area with several windows and the reddish-brown roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, vertical wall lines, and the rooftop water tanks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, the back balcony, and both rooftop water tanks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the stairway to the balcony, additional windows, and a clear view of the roof's slope.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a covered porch and balcony above, accessed by exterior stairs, minimal decorative elements.
